# url

**Instance Property**

The URL that returned the metadata, taking server-side redirects into account.

## Declaration

```swift
var url: URL? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The URL that returns the metadata may differ from the [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LPLinkMetadata/originalURL] to which you sent the metadata request. This can happen if the server redirects the request, for example, when a resource has moved, or when the original URL is a domain alias.

## Identifying the link

- **originalURL**: The original URL of the metadata request.
